about.title: About
about.text1: I am a Junior Full Stack Developer currently studying at Vilnius Coding School in the JavaScript Full Stack program. My focus is on modern web development and building scalable full stack applications.
about.text3: I am continuously expanding my knowledge by learning new technologies and improving my technical skills.

items.title: API-Countries-React-Vite
items.description: Implemented GET requests to the RestCountries API and used React Router for client-side navigation.

items.title: Landing-page
items.description: Responsive landing page, built with json data and React icons.

items.title: Full Stack Todo App (TS + Render)
items.description: A fullstack Todo application built with Vite TS, and deployed on Render.

items.title: Wordle Game
items.description: A web-based implementation of the popular Wordle game.

items.title: TV Maze API
items.description: A web application for browsing TV shows using the TVMaze API.

items.title: E-commerce FakeStore API
items.description: E-commerce application using FakeStore API with routing functionality, authentication, and shopping cart features.

items.title: Weather App
items.description: A weather application built with React and TypeScript, utilizing an API for real-time weather data.

about.title: Apie
about.text1: Esu jaunesnysis "Full Stack" programuotojas, šiuo metu besimokantis Vilniaus kodavimo mokykloje "JavaScript Full Stack" programoje. Daugiausia dėmesio skiriu moderniam žiniatinklio svetainių kūrimui ir keičiamo dydžio "Full Stack" programų kūrimui.
about.text3: Nuolat plečiu savo žinias mokydamasis naujų technologijų ir tobulindamas techninius įgūdžius.

items.title: API-Countries-React-Vite
items.description: Įgyvendintos GET užklausos į "RestCountries" API ir kliento pusės navigacijai naudotas "React Router".

items.title: Landing puslapis
items.description: Prisitaikantis nukreipiamasis puslapis, sukurtas naudojant JSON duomenis ir React ikonėles.

items.title: Full Stack Todo App (TS + Render)
items.description: Pilnai sukurta "Todo" sukurta naudojant Vite TS ir išleista Render platformoje.

items.title: TV Maze API
items.description: Žiniatinklio programa, skirta televizijos laidoms naršyti naudojant "TVMaze" API.

items.title: E-commerce FakeStore API
items.description: Elektroninės prekybos programa, naudojanti FakeStore API su funkcionalumu, autentifikacija ir pirkinių krepšelio funkcijomis.

items.title: Weather App
items.description: Orų stebėjimo programa, sukurta naudojant React ir TypeScript, naudojanti API realaus laiko oro duomenims.
